problem_title: Travel Rule messaging remains operationally fragmented
problem_description: Crypto exchanges face difficulties managing originator and beneficiary data when Travel Rule messages exist outside unified workflows. This fragmentation slows exception handling, weakens audit evidence, and complicates tracking across VASP-to-VASP exchanges.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY links originator and beneficiary data, message status, exceptions and case management into a single workflow to streamline Travel Rule operations and preserve audit evidence for compliance teams.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule message to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages through status tracking, exception handling, case creation, evidence preservation and reporting for crypto exchange compliance workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for exchange compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a compliance control layer that connects Travel Rule data, routing status, exceptions, customer and wallet records into structured workflows for exchange compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support Travel Rule workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages, applies jurisdictional policies, handles exceptions, creates cases for review, and tracks status throughout the Travel Rule workflow on one platform.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider outputs and exception records as audit-ready evidence to support Travel Rule compliance reviews and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates with multiple Travel Rule providers to consolidate message routing and status updates into a connected operational compliance layer for exchanges.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above Travel Rule providers, connecting their outputs into structured workflows without replacing or competing with them.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule workflows for crypto exchanges
final_description: Review how SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, exceptions, data routing and audit evidence into one compliance workflow.
